output: Batch 2 executed. Extended the video editor data provider with optional checkpoint persistence methods, updated the Supabase provider to retain only the newest 30 checkpoints and purge checkpoints older than 24 hours before loading, and wired history-aware commit options plus onBeforeCommitRef into useTimelineSave. A repo-wide TypeScript check passed, and batch progress was checkpointed to .megaplan/plans/implement-undo-redo-history-20260326-2240/execution_batch_2.json.

task_updates.executor_notes: Extended DataProvider with optional saveCheckpoint/loadCheckpoints methods and implemented both in SupabaseDataProvider. Verified saveCheckpoint inserts into timeline_checkpoints and then deletes the oldest rows beyond the 30-row cap for the same timeline/user. Verified loadCheckpoints deletes rows older than 24 hours before selecting the remaining checkpoints ordered by created_at descending.

Updated useTimelineSave so commitData accepts transactionId, semantic, and skipHistory; added onBeforeCommitRef; and verified the callback runs before dataRef.current is replaced, only when save is enabled and skipHistory is not set. Verified applyTimelineEdit forwards transactionId/semantic, applyResolvedConfigEdit now accepts semantic, and both the polled timeline sync path and reloadFromServer explicitly pass skipHistory: true.

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: Confirmed both checkpoint methods are optional on DataProvider, saveCheckpoint enforces the 30-row cap by deleting the oldest rows after insert, and loadCheckpoints removes expired rows before selecting the remaining checkpoints.

Confirmed onBeforeCommitRef is invoked before dataRef.current is replaced, it is skipped when save is false or skipHistory is true, reloadFromServer and the polled timeline sync pass skipHistory: true, and applyResolvedConfigEdit now accepts semantic in its options.
